label: WATT·IQ Energy Bridge
info:
Modbus RTU/TCP → Scale → MQTT Publish
Selec EM2M → Messung PLC → InfluxDB via Telegraf

Install: node-red-contrib-modbus, node-red-contrib-mqtt-broker

name: Read Selec EM2M Registers
info:
FC03 Read Holding Registers
Start: 3999 (= Register 4000, 0-based)
Count: 14 registers
Slave: 1

name: Scale Raw → Engineering Units
Publish to Mosquitto
info:
Topic comes from msg.topic set in function node
format: factory/building-a/meter01/data
QoS 1, Retain: true

name: Format InfluxDB Line Protocol
Handle Modbus Error
SETUP INSTRUCTIONS
info:
## WATT·IQ Node-RED Flow Setup

### 1. Install required nodes
```
npm install node-red-contrib-modbus
```

### 2. Configure Modbus server node
- Type: TCP (if using PLC Ethernet) or RTU Serial
- TCP Host: IP address ของ Messung PLC (default 192.168.1.10)
- TCP Port: 502
- Unit ID: 1 (Modbus slave address)

### 3. Configure MQTT broker
- Host: localhost (ถ้าใช้ Mosquitto ใน Docker)
- Port: 1883

### 4. Set InfluxDB token
- เปิด node 'Write to InfluxDB'
- แก้ Authorization header เป็น Token ของคุณ

### 5. Topic Structure
```
factory/{location}/{meter_id}/data    → JSON payload
factory/{location}/{meter_id}/status  → online/offline
factory/system/nodered/status         → birth/will
```

### 6. JSON Payload Format
```json
{
  "ts": 1720000000,
  "meter_id": "meter01",
  "kW": 12.4,
  "kWh": 1532.1,
  "V_L1": 220.3,
  "I_L1": 18.7,
  "PF": 0.92,
  "Hz": 50.1,
  "CO2_kg": 906.5,
  "alarm_peak": false
}
```
